title: Tone Entry Schema
description: Schema for tone taxonomy entries (Axis 1, situational-register dimension). Tone and Voice are both part of Axis 1 (Voice and Tone), but Tone captures situational register - how the voice feels in a given context - while Voice captures persistent identity - who is speaking.

spectrum.description: Which emotional or rhetorical spectrum this tone lives on (e.g., warmth, confidence, formality)

spectrum_position.description: Position on the spectrum (0 = one extreme, 1 = the other extreme)

markers.description: Observable textual markers that signal this tone
